scripts.backtest:sample: node --env-file=.env -e "import('./functions/backtest/backtestRunner.js').then(async ({runBacktest}) => { const result = await runBacktest({ symbol: 'SBIN', symbolToken: '3045', fromDate: '2026-04-05 09:15', toDate: '2026-04-05 15:30', averageHistoricalVolPerMin: 100 }); console.log(JSON.stringify({ metrics: result.metrics, trades: result.trades.slice(0, 5), signals: result.signals.length, rejections: result.rejections.length }, null, 2)); }).catch((error) => { console.error(error); process.exit(1); })"
